news.title:
Raymond Realty's Q4 FY26 pre-sales surged 139% YoY to ₹1,519 crore, driven by strong MMR demand.
Collections grew 4% QoQ but fell 9% YoY for FY26; net debt stood at ₹605 crore, EBITDA margin at 13%.
news.summary:
Raymond Realty's Q4 FY26 pre-sales surged 139% YoY to ₹1,519 crore, driven by strong MMR demand.
Collections grew 4% QoQ but fell 9% YoY for FY26; net debt stood at ₹605 crore, EBITDA margin at 13%.

news.title:
Raymond Realty launched Ten X District 9 in Thane, targeting ₹2,000 crore revenue.
Shares rose 0.93% to ₹395.50; project spans 9 acres and aligns with IGBC standards.
news.summary:
Raymond Realty launched Ten X District 9 in Thane, targeting ₹2,000 crore revenue.
Shares rose 0.93% to ₹395.50; project spans 9 acres and aligns with IGBC standards.

news.title: Raymond Realty signed agreements for a Rs 3,000 crore residential project in Kandivali, Mumbai.
news.summary: Raymond Realty signed agreements for a Rs 3,000 crore residential project in Kandivali, Mumbai.

news.title:
Raymond Ltd to join Arihant Capital's investor conference on March 11, 2026.
Discussions on Q3 FY26 & 9M FY26 results; presentation already shared.
news.summary:
Raymond Ltd to join Arihant Capital's investor conference on March 11, 2026.
Discussions on Q3 FY26 & 9M FY26 results; presentation already shared.

news.title:
Raymond Ltd to participate in Anand Rathi's Aerospace & Defense Conference on Feb 17, 2026.
Investor presentation on Q3 FY26 and 9M FY26 results will be shared at the conference.
news.summary:
Raymond Ltd to participate in Anand Rathi's Aerospace & Defense Conference on Feb 17, 2026.
Investor presentation on Q3 FY26 and 9M FY26 results will be shared at the conference.

news.title:
Raymond expects US revenue to grow from ₹500 crore to ₹1,000–1,200 crore post US-India tariff reduction.
Exports, 12% of Raymond's turnover, may rise with US exposure increasing to 10–12% amid demand growth.
news.summary:
Raymond expects US revenue to grow from ₹500 crore to ₹1,000–1,200 crore post US-India tariff reduction.
Exports, 12% of Raymond's turnover, may rise with US exposure increasing to 10–12% amid demand growth.

news.title:
Raymond's Q3 aerospace revenue surged 49%, showcasing robust growth.
CEO Gautam Maini highlighted strong EBITDA growth and Budget 2026 focus.
news.summary:
Raymond's Q3 aerospace revenue surged 49%, showcasing robust growth.
CEO Gautam Maini highlighted strong EBITDA growth and Budget 2026 focus.

news.title:
Raymond targets long-term EBITDA margins of 23-25% in Aerospace and over 15% in Auto.
The company expects revenue and profit growth to outpace working capital increases.
news.summary:
Raymond targets long-term EBITDA margins of 23-25% in Aerospace and over 15% in Auto.
The company expects revenue and profit growth to outpace working capital increases.

news.title:
Raymond Ltd plans Rs.1,000 crore capex over 5 years.
The company targets 18% revenue growth in Q3 FY26.
news.summary:
Raymond Ltd plans Rs.1,000 crore capex over 5 years.
The company targets 18% revenue growth in Q3 FY26.

news.title:
Raymond Ltd uploaded the Q3 FY26 investor conference audio held on Jan 27, 2026.
The recording discusses financial performance and is available on their website.
news.summary:
Raymond Ltd uploaded the Q3 FY26 investor conference audio held on Jan 27, 2026.

news.title:
Raymond Ltd reports flat revenue growth with margin expansion in Dec 2025 quarter.
Rising interest costs and low EPS led to a downgrade to 'Sell' in mojo grade.
news.summary:
Raymond Ltd reports flat revenue growth with margin expansion in Dec 2025 quarter.
Rising interest costs and low EPS led to a downgrade to 'Sell' in mojo grade.

news.title:
Raymond Realty reports increased revenue and profit in Q3.
Margins were impacted due to expenses related to new launches.
news.summary:
Raymond Realty reports increased revenue and profit in Q3.
Margins were impacted due to expenses related to new launches.

news.title: Raymond Lifestyle shares rose nearly 6% after strong Q3 operational results.
news.summary: Raymond Lifestyle shares rose nearly 6% after strong Q3 operational results.

news.title: Raymond's MD highlights strong quarterly momentum driven by Aerospace, Defense, Precision Tech, and Auto Components.
news.summary: Raymond's MD highlights strong quarterly momentum driven by Aerospace, Defense, Precision Tech, and Auto Components.

news.title:
Raymond's board approves merger with Everblue Apparel to streamline structure.
No change in shareholding as Everblue is a wholly owned subsidiary of Raymond.
news.summary:
Raymond's board approves merger with Everblue Apparel to streamline structure.
No change in shareholding as Everblue is a wholly owned subsidiary of Raymond.

news.title:
Raymond's board approved unaudited Q3 and 9-month financials ending Dec 2025.
Demerger gains of approx ₹87,798 Cr and ₹53,264 Cr recognized; Q3 loss, 9-month profit reported.
news.summary:
Raymond's board approved unaudited Q3 and 9-month financials ending Dec 2025.
Demerger gains of approx ₹87,798 Cr and ₹53,264 Cr recognized; Q3 loss, 9-month profit reported.

news.title:
Raymond's Q3 net profit dropped 33% YoY to ₹43 crore, while revenue rose 5.4% to ₹1,849 crore.
EBITDA grew 32% to ₹237 crore, with margins improving to 13% from 10.2%.
news.summary:
Raymond's Q3 net profit dropped 33% YoY to ₹43 crore, while revenue rose 5.4% to ₹1,849 crore.
EBITDA grew 32% to ₹237 crore, with margins improving to 13% from 10.2%.

news.title: Raymond Realty launches a redevelopment project in Wadala with a revenue potential of ₹5,000 crore.
news.summary: Raymond Realty launches a redevelopment project in Wadala with a revenue potential of ₹5,000 crore.

news.title: Satyaki Ghosh assumes leadership at Raymond, aiming for a turnaround.
news.summary: Satyaki Ghosh assumes leadership at Raymond, aiming for a turnaround.

news.title:
Raymond Lifestyle appoints Satyaki Ghosh as CEO amid challenges like slowing demand, store closures, and margin pressure.
Despite profit pressures, analysts remain optimistic, expecting a 17.2% CAGR growth in branded apparel revenue FY25-FY28.
news.summary:
Raymond Lifestyle appoints Satyaki Ghosh as CEO amid challenges like slowing demand, store closures, and margin pressure.
Despite profit pressures, analysts remain optimistic, expecting a 17.2% CAGR growth in branded apparel revenue FY25-FY28.
